'''Squad Seven''' was a small group of specialists created by [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commando]] [[Alpha (Advanced Recon Commando)|Alpha]]. It was often led by [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commanders]] [[Cody/Legends|Cody]] and [[Davijaan/Legends|Davijaan]], although the [[Squad/Legends|squad]] was managed by [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Jorir]].

==Description==
The squad contained cross-trained [[Clone Commander/Legends|clone commanders]], [[Clone trooper pilot|pilots]], [[Clone marine|marines]], [[Clone SCUBA trooper/Legends|SCUBA troopers]], demolition specialists, and [[Clone sharpshooter/Legends|snipers]].<ref name="GTTGA" />

==History==
A small group of specialists, Squad Seven, was created by [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commando]] [[Alpha (Advanced Recon Commando)|Alpha]] to accompany ranking [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] on any type of mission,<ref name="GTTGA" /> including special commando operations. After undergoing [[ARC program/Legends|ARC training program]], [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Cody/Legends|Cody]] hand-picked a few of his fellow graduates to become the part of elite Squad Seven.<ref name="TOS&VC 32">[[Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection 32|''Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection'' 32]]</ref> It was often led by Clone Commanders Cody and [[Davijaan/Legends|Davijaan]], although the [[Squad/Legends|squad]] was managed by [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Jorir]].<ref name="GTTGA" />

The squad accompanied [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi Generals]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] on several occasions.<ref name="GTTGA" />

During the [[Siege of Cato Neimoidia|Battle of Cato Neimoidia]], the men of Squad Seven assisted Jedi [[General/Legends|General]] Kenobi in his assault on [[Viceroy of the Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation Viceroy]] [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray's]] redoubt. With their help, Kenobi procured Gunray's valuable [[Mechno-chair/Legends|mechno-chair]], which contained a holographic message from [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] to the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Viceroy/Legends|Viceroy]].<ref name="LoE">''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]''</ref>
